_meta.purpose: Testimonials + trusted-by row on the homepage (// SYS.05 > TRANSMISSION_LOG).
_meta.status: Contains one REAL client testimonial: Vanshika Tyagi, the research scholar Felis AI was built for. The wording is a draft based on the described use case (verified: false). Do NOT add invented names; only add testimonials from real, consenting people.
_meta.todo: Confirm the exact wording with Vanshika and that she consents to publish, then set verified: true. Add further real testimonials the same way. Until a quote is verified, the consuming component should hide it (and hide the whole section if none are verified).

quotes.text: I read a huge number of research papers, and Felis changed how I work. I hand it my papers and ask questions across all of them instead of digging back through each one, and it points me to the right passage.
quotes.name: Vanshika Tyagi
